data.title: RocketReach introduces email Sequences and expanded Intent Data coverage to improve revenue workflows.- Product release in February 2026- Major database growth- Simplified Universal Credits model for API customers
data.description: In February 2026, RocketReach unveiled new features including email Sequences, expanded Intent Data coverage, and a larger database. Additionally, a new Universal Credits model was introduced for API customers. These enhancements aim to assist users in leveraging the platform's capabilities more effectively.

data.title: Warner Bros. Discovery reopens deal talks with Paramount after rejecting bid for Netflix. Paramount willing to offer higher amount.
data.description: Netflix outbid Paramount in a takeover bid, focusing solely on acquiring the streaming and studio operations. Paramount, however, expressed willingness to increase their offer if discussions were to resume.

data.title: Royal Caribbean Group appoints Christopher J. Wiernicki, former ABS Chairman & CEO, to Board of Directors.
data.description: In Miami on February 17, 2026, Royal Caribbean Group disclosed the addition of Christopher J. Wiernicki to its Board of Directors. Wiernicki, the former Chairman & CEO of the American Bureau of Shipping (ABS), joined the board with immediate effect. Possessing over 40 years of experience, Wiernicki's appointment signifies a significant move for the company. Royal Caribbean Group operates under the NYSE ticker symbol RCL, and this strategic appointment highlights their commitment to strengthening their leadership team.

data.title: RMX's VAST™ plays key role in $3.1B investment for Counter-UAS networks, offers advanced video compression technology.
data.description: RMX Industries, Inc. announced its VAST™ video compression platform aids in visual intelligence flow as the Department of Defense (DoD) invests $3.1 billion in counter-UAS capabilities. The company highlighted the significance of its technology in managing video content efficiently.

data.title: Africrypt founders, Raees and Ameer Cajee, return to South Africa as investors continue to face difficulties serving legal documents.
data.description: After Africrypt's collapse, Raees and Ameer Cajee have returned to South Africa. Investors are facing challenges in serving legal documents as the investigation continues. The brothers are at the center of the controversy involving a significant amount of money. Their return has reignited interest in the case, with many hoping for a resolution to the situation.

US civil rights leader Jesse Jackson died “peacefully” Tuesday morning, his family said, after a lifetime fighting for equality. Jackson helped lead the charge on African-American rights alongside Martin Luther King Jr in the 1960s. He was also a candidate for the Democratic

data.title: Orion secures $3.1M contract for electrical work at a major business; part of ongoing projects for valued client.
data.description: One hundred and twenty-three people were reported missing after the devastating floods hit the region, which left fifty-six people dead and over two hundred injured. Emergency services have rescued a total of one hundred and eighty-seven individuals so far. The floods also caused damage to over three hundred houses and wiped out several roads and bridges in the affected areas. The government has allocated ten million dollars for immediate relief efforts and has promised to provide long-term support for the rehabilitation of the affected communities.Volunteers and aid organizations are working tirelessly to provide food, water, and medical assistance to those in need. The situation remains critical as more heavy rainfall is expected in the coming days. The authorities are urging people to stay vigilant and follow safety instructions to avoid further casualties.

data.title: Obagi Medical & Aesthetic Record collaborate in ALOHA Program for Real-World Evidence for Obagi® saypha® MagIQ™. Aesthetic Record chosen for tech innovation, efficiency, and supporting thousands of practices nationwide.
data.description: Aesthetic Record has been recognized as a top aesthetics Electronic Medical Records (EMR) and practice management provider for its dedication to technological advancement, operational effectiveness, and assistance to numerous aesthetic practices across the country. This selection is based on its track record of supporting thousands of aesthetic practices nationwide and its commitment to innovation in technology.

data.title: Weyerhaeuser reveals 2 new engineered wood products at NAHB Builders' Show in Orlando. Showcase in Seattle, Feb 17, 2026.
data.description: Cutting-edge flooring products currently under development will be showcased at Weyerhaeuser's exhibit in Orlando. On February 17, 2026, Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE: WY) unveiled two advanced engineered wood offerings at the National Association of Home Builders event.

data.title: ADP estimates U.S. private employers added 10,250 jobs per week ending Jan 31, 2026, the third consecutive increase.
data.description: In Roseland, New Jersey on February 17, 2026, it was reported that U.S. private employers were adding an average of 10,250 jobs per week for the four weeks leading up to January 31, 2026. This data comes from the NER Pulse, a weekly summary derived from the monthly ADP National Employment Report. This marks the third consecutive week of steady job growth in the country.

data.title: OBOOK Holdings Inc. launches OwlPay Cash remittance app for estimated $230 billion U.S. outbound remittance economy.
data.description: OBOOK Holdings Inc. has launched OwlPay Cash, a new remittance app tailored for the U.S. outbound remittance market, which is valued at around $230 billion. The app's debut is seen as a strategic move by the company to tap into this lucrative sector. OwlPay Cash is aimed at providing a convenient and efficient way for users to send money internationally. The parent company, OBOOK Holdings Inc., is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol OWLS. This development highlights a significant entry into the burgeoning remittance industry by offering a modern digital solution for the substantial flow of funds sent overseas from the U.S.
GREER SAYS STEEL, ALUMINUM TARIFFS WILL STAY IN PLACE

data.title: Marvion Inc. gains two new investors on Feb. 2, 2026, strengthening capital base; disclosed through Form 8-K filing.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Marvion Inc. (OTCQB: MVNC) revealed that it had secured agreements with two fresh investors in Hong Kong. The company finalized the Stock Purchase Agreements on February 2, 2026. The details of these transactions were officially documented in a Form 8-K filing.

data.title: Gibson Energy completes $215M equity offering, including over-allotment option.
data.description: In recent updates on the ongoing pandemic, it has been reported that a total of 150,000 new cases have been confirmed globally, bringing the total number of cases to 3.5 million. These new cases have resulted in an additional 3,000 deaths, raising the worldwide death toll to 250,000. The situation remains severe in many countries, with efforts to control the spread of the virus ongoing. The World Health Organization continues to monitor the situation closely and provide guidance to countries on necessary measures to combat the pandemic.

data.title: Latin Metals plans to spin out two Peruvian copper projects into Latin Explore by Q1 2026, aiming to create value for shareholders.
data.description: Latin Explore is set to acquire two copper assets located in Peru, with the completion of the spin-out expected in the first quarter of 2026. This strategic move aims to unlock significant value for shareholders by creating parallel opportunities in the lucrative copper market.

data.title: Continu launches Experts to integrate Conversational AI Agent with Google Drive and Microsoft OneDrive for instant answers.
data.description: Continu's Conversational AI Agent now has the ability to link with verified platforms such as Google Drive and Microsoft OneDrive, enabling real-time, access-controlled responses on Slack and Microsoft Teams. The launch of Experts by Continu in New York on February 17, 2026 introduces this new capability.

data.title: Paramount gets fresh opportunity as Warner Bros. Discovery reopens talks, facing unanswered questions.
data.description: On Tuesday, there was a new development in the takeover battle as Warner Bros. Discovery resumed discussions with the suitor that had previously been rejected. Despite this, significant uncertainties still linger around the situation.
